info.title: LoadWhiz API
info.description:
# LoadWhiz API

REST API for managing organizations, verified load-test targets, and load test configurations.

## Authentication

Most endpoints require a JWT access token:

```
Authorization: Bearer <access_token>
```

Obtain tokens via `POST /api/v1/auth/login` or `POST /api/v1/auth/register`.

## Organization scope

Resources under `/api/v1/organizations/{org_id}/…` require membership in that organization.
Write operations typically require the **owner** or **admin** role unless noted otherwise.

## Rate limits

Rate limits may apply in production. Contact support for quota details.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile, organization memberships, and active organization.

patch.description: Set the organization used as the default workspace for the authenticated user.

403.description: Not a member of the organization.

post.description: Create a new user account and return authentication tokens.
Authenticate with email and password.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token.

401.description: Refresh token is invalid or expired.

post.description: Revoke the current refresh token and end the session.
Confirm email ownership using the verification token.

400.description: Verification token is invalid or expired.

post.description: Send a new email verification message to the authenticated user.
Initiate a password reset for the given email address.
Set a new password using a password reset token.

400.description: Reset token is invalid or expired.

post.description: Create the user's first organization and mark onboarding as complete. Available only while onboarding has not been completed.

get.description: Returns organizations the authenticated user belongs to, including role and join date.

post.description: Create a new organization. The authenticated user becomes the owner.

get.description: Retrieve organization details. Requires membership in the organization.

403.description: Not a member of this organization.

patch.description: Update organization settings. Requires the owner or admin role.

delete.description: Permanently delete an organization. Requires the owner role.

get.description: Returns all members of the organization.

403.description: Not a member of this organization.

patch.description: Change a member's role. Requires the owner role. The owner role cannot be assigned via this endpoint.

delete.description: Remove a member from the organization. Requires the owner or admin role.

post.description: Invite a user to join the organization by email. Requires the owner or admin role.

get.description: Returns pending invitations for the organization. Requires the owner or admin role.

delete.description: Revoke a pending invitation. Requires the owner or admin role.

post.description: Accept an invitation and join the organization. The invite email must match the authenticated user's email.

400.description: Invite token is invalid or expired.

403.description: Invite email does not match the authenticated user.

post.description: Decline an invitation without joining the organization.

400.description: Invite token is invalid or expired.

403.description: Invite email does not match the authenticated user.

get.description: List target hosts registered for the organization.

post.description: Register a domain for ownership verification before it can be used in load tests.

409.description: Hostname is already registered for this organization.

422.description: Hostname is invalid or not allowed.

get.description: Retrieve host details, status, and verification instructions.

delete.description: Remove a host and its associated load test configurations.

post.description: Run an immediate verification check for a host in `pending` status.
Reset verification for a `failed` host and start a new verification window.
Parse an OpenAPI 3.0 or 3.1 specification and return HTTP operations that match the target host. No load test is created.

Create a load test configuration in `draft` status.

- Set `url_source` to `manual` and provide `urls` to define requests directly.
- Set `url_source` to `openapi` and provide `openapi_document` to import from an inline specification.
- To upload a specification file, use `POST /from-openapi` instead.

get.description: Returns load tests for the organization. Optionally filter by target host.

post.summary: Create load test from specification file
post.description: Create a load test by uploading an OpenAPI 3.0 or 3.1 specification file. Request URLs are generated from operations whose host matches the verified target host.

get.description: Retrieve a load test configuration by identifier.

403.description: Not a member of this organization.

patch.description: Update a load test while it is in `draft` status.

409.description: Load test is not in draft status.

delete.description: Delete a load test. Not allowed while a test is `pending` or `running`.

409.description: Load test cannot be deleted in its current status.

patch.summary: Update load test from specification file
patch.description: Replace request URLs by re-importing an OpenAPI specification file. Available only while the load test is in `draft` status.

409.description: Load test is not in draft status.

post.description: Start a load test run using Grafana k6 in Docker. The test must be in `draft` or `complete` status. If `scheduled_at` is in the future, execution is deferred until that time.

404.description: Load test or host not found.

409.description: Test cannot be run in its current status.

post.description: Stop a pending or running load test by terminating the k6 container.

409.description: Test is not pending or running.

get.description: Returns execution history for a load test, newest first.
Retrieve a single run result by identifier.

404.description: Load test or result not found.

get.description: Returns chart-ready metrics for the results dashboard: overview, aggregates, time series, per-URL breakdown, and latency distribution. Raw k6 summary is not included.

404.description: Load test, result, or dashboard data not found.

409.description: Run is still in progress; dashboard not ready.

url.title: Url
url.description: Hostname or URL of the target (scheme optional).

verification_method.description: Verification method: DNS TXT record or HTTP file.

CreateHostRequest.title: Create Host
CreateHostRequest.description: Register a domain as a load test target.

test_type.description: Client scheduling mode. `per-test`: distribute clients evenly across the duration. `per-second`: start the client count every second. `maintain-load`: repeat the request sequence for the full duration.

total.title: Total
total.description: Total number of virtual clients. Minimum is 15.

initial.title: Initial
initial.description: Clients active at start. Applies only when `test_type` is `maintain-load`.

error_threshold.title: Error Threshold
error_threshold.description: Maximum acceptable error rate, as a percentage (0–100).

name.title: Name
name.description: Display name for the load test.

callback.title: Callback
callback.description: Webhook invoked when a test run completes.

callback_email.title: Callback Email
callback_email.description: Email address notified when a test run completes.

scheduled_at.title: Scheduled At
scheduled_at.description: Scheduled start time (ISO-8601 or `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM` in UTC).

host_id.title: Host Id
host_id.description: ID of a verified target host.

urls.title: Urls
urls.description: Ordered HTTP requests. Required when `url_source` is `manual`.

openapi_document.title: Openapi Document
openapi_document.description: OpenAPI 3.0 or 3.1 document. Required when `url_source` is `openapi`.

CreateLoadTestRequest.title: Create Load Test
CreateLoadTestRequest.description: Request body for creating a load test with a JSON payload.

last_checked_at.title: Last Checked At
last_checked_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent verification check.

last_check_error.title: Last Check Error
last_check_error.description: Most recent verification error, if any.

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.description: DNS or HTTP instructions required to complete verification.

HostResponse.title: Host
HostResponse.description: Verified or pending load test target host.

token.title: Token
token.description: Token value, without the scheme prefix.

header_name.title: Header Name
header_name.description: HTTP header that carries the token.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.description: Cookies to send with the request, as name-value pairs.

raw_post_body.title: Raw Post Body
raw_post_body.description: Request body content for methods that send a body.

payload_file_url.title: Payload File Url
payload_file_url.description: URL of an external payload file for per-client request data.

variables.title: Variables
variables.description: Variables extracted from prior responses in the sequence.

auth_hint.title: Auth Hint
auth_hint.description: Authentication required for this endpoint when importing from OpenAPI and credentials were not present in the specification. Configure `credentials`, `bearer`, or `cookies` before execution.

HttpRequestConfig.title: HTTP Request Step
HttpRequestConfig.description: A single HTTP request executed by each virtual client in sequence.

ImportedOperation.title: Imported Operation
ImportedOperation.description: HTTP operation matched during OpenAPI import preview.

token.title: Token
token.description: Invitation token from the invite email.

url_source.description: Whether requests were defined manually or imported from OpenAPI.

openapi_spec_filename.title: Openapi Spec Filename
openapi_spec_filename.description: Source specification filename, when imported from a file upload.

import_summary.title: Import Summary
import_summary.description: Statistics from the most recent OpenAPI import, if applicable.

latest_result.description: Most recent run summary, when available.

LoadTestResultStatusEnum.title: Load Test Result Status
LoadTestResultStatusEnum.description: Status of a single load test run.

LoadTestStatusEnum.title: Load Test Status
LoadTestStatusEnum.description: Lifecycle state of a load test configuration.

LoadTestTypeEnum.title: Load Test Type
LoadTestTypeEnum.description: How virtual clients are scheduled during a test run.

LoadTestUrlSourceEnum.title: URL Source
LoadTestUrlSourceEnum.description: How the request list was created.

OpenApiImportPreview.title: OpenAPI Import Preview
OpenApiImportPreview.description: Result of previewing an OpenAPI import without creating a load test.

refresh_token.title: Refresh Token
refresh_token.description: Refresh token from login or registration.

source.title: Source
source.description: Extraction source. Currently only `header` is supported.

RequestVariable.title: Response Variable
RequestVariable.description: Value captured from a response header for use in a later request.

SkippedOperation.title: Skipped Operation
SkippedOperation.description: Operation excluded during OpenAPI import preview.

servers.title: Servers
servers.description: Base URLs declared in the specification.

SpecInfo.title: OpenAPI Spec Info
SpecInfo.description: Summary of an imported OpenAPI document.

TokenResponse.title: Authentication Tokens
TokenResponse.description: Access and refresh tokens issued after authentication.

UpdateLoadTestRequest.title: Update Load Test
UpdateLoadTestRequest.description: Request body for updating a load test in `draft` status.

is_email_verified.title: Is Email Verified
is_email_verified.description: Whether the email address is verified.

error_threshold.title: Error Threshold
error_threshold.description: Maximum error rate, as a percentage.

scheduled_at.title: Scheduled At
scheduled_at.description: Scheduled start time (ISO-8601 or `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM` UTC).

BearerAuth.description: JWT access token obtained from the Auth endpoints.

tags.name: auth
tags.description: Account registration, login, token refresh, and password recovery.

tags.name: users
tags.description: Authenticated user profile and workspace preferences.

tags.name: hosts
tags.description: Register and verify domains used as load test targets.

tags.name: load-tests
tags.description: Create and manage load test configurations for verified hosts.
